summary: PR #2647 matched three functions across pltrick, mplib, and mncount with small source-shape changes: removing a volatile stack-alignment workaround in pl_80037C60, indexing groundCollVtx directly from j_inner->vtx_start in mpLib_80057424/mpJointListAdd, and adjusting mnCount_8025092C inline counter placement plus PAD_STACK size. The bot report records 3 new matches and +2552 matched bytes.

key_files.role: Matched pl_80037C60 by removing volatile prev2070_word and assigning prev_union through a union reinterpretation of prev2070_int.
Matched mpJointListAdd via mpLib_80057424 by removing temporary s16 start and directly indexing groundCollVtx[j_inner->vtx_start].
Matched mnCount_8025092C by making mnCount_8025092C_inline take the loop counter as a parameter, calling it with 0, and changing PAD_STACK(4) to PAD_STACK(12).

what_changed.change: Removed todo comments about a volatile stack-alignment hack, removed volatile s32 prev2070_word, and replaced assignment through prev_union.x2070_int with prev_union = *(union Struct2070*) &prev2070_int.
Removed local s16 start = j_inner->vtx_start and initialized CollVtx* vtx directly from &groundCollVtx[j_inner->vtx_start].
Changed static inline mnCount_8025092C_inline from void parameters with a local int i to int i parameter, called it as mnCount_8025092C_inline(0), and increased PAD_STACK from 4 to 12.

smart_moves.text: Removed a fake volatile stack-shaping workaround once the argument could be reinterpreted directly into the union form needed for matching pl_80037C60.
Avoided an extra temporary for j_inner->vtx_start when direct indexing produced the desired register allocation in mpLib_80057424/mpJointListAdd.
Adjusted inline helper parameterization and stack padding together for mnCount_8025092C instead of treating the loop counter and stack pad as unrelated issues.

decomp_lessons.lesson: For stack-sensitive matches, a direct reinterpretation into the intended union may replace volatile local copies that were only steering stack layout.
A temporary variable for a struct field can perturb register allocation; direct array indexing from the field may better match original codegen.
Inline helper shape can affect matching: passing an initial loop counter as a helper parameter, instead of declaring it locally, changed mnCount_8025092C into the matching form in this PR.

naming_conventions.text: No new naming convention is established. Existing names such as fp, acp, j_inner, vtx, prev_union, and Struct2070 were used or preserved; the PR evidence is about code shape, not renaming policy.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Remove volatile local stack hack when a typed/union reinterpretation produces the needed stack layout.
Eliminate unnecessary temporary field loads when direct field-based indexing improves register allocation.
Use narrow PAD_STACK adjustment only with match evidence; this PR changed PAD_STACK(4) to PAD_STACK(12) for mnCount_8025092C.

review_feedback.text: decomp-dev[bot] reported matched code 71.85% (+0.07%, +2552 bytes) and 3 new matches: pl_80037C60, mpJointListAdd, and mnCount_8025092C each reaching 100.00%.
review_feedback.author: decomp-dev[bot]

follow_up_queries: pl_80037C60 volatile prev2070_word prev_union Struct2070 stack layout

notes: PR body explicitly describes the intended match tactics for all three changed functions.
Diff excerpt is complete for the small changes in all three files.
Bot report supports that the three named functions became new matches and provides matched-code delta.
There were no human review comments in the loaded slice; reviewer intent or detailed acceptance rationale is not inferred.
The PR body says mpJointListAdd is matched in mpLib_80057424 whose loop is shared/inlined; no additional lookup was performed to resolve that symbol relationship beyond the supplied evidence.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Direct union reinterpretation can replace volatile stack-shaping locals
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR #2647, pl_80037C60 matched after removing a volatile s32 copy of prev2070_int and assigning prev_union via *(union Struct2070*) &prev2070_int. Treat volatile stack hacks as suspect and prefer a type/union expression when PR and diff evidence show it fixes the stack layout.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Removing a temporary field copy can affect register allocation
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR #2647, mpJointListAdd/mpLib_80057424 matched after removing s16 start = j_inner->vtx_start and indexing groundCollVtx[j_inner->vtx_start] directly. For register-allocation-sensitive loops, compare direct field indexing against temporary field copies.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Inline helper parameter placement can be part of the match
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR #2647, mnCount_8025092C matched after changing mnCount_8025092C_inline to accept int i and calling mnCount_8025092C_inline(0), rather than declaring the counter locally inside the inline helper.

source_update_candidates.title: Volatile locals used only for stack/register steering should be revisited when typed reinterpretation is available
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2647 provides a concrete case where a long-standing volatile s32 stack-alignment workaround was removed after direct union reinterpretation of a parameter produced the matching stack layout. This may be a useful example under matching-tactics-need-evidence or typed-fields-over-pointer-math, but should be curated as an example rather than a blanket rule.
source_update_candidates.reason: Existing standards discourage broad steering hacks and prefer typed access; this PR is a concise evidence-backed example.

source_update_candidates.title: Direct field indexing versus temporary field copies can be a register-allocation tactic
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2647 matched mpJointListAdd/mpLib_80057424 by removing a temp s16 start and indexing groundCollVtx[j_inner->vtx_start] directly. Consider adding this as a narrow example of source-shape/register-allocation sensitivity, not as a general preference to remove temporaries.
source_update_candidates.reason: The PR body explicitly links the source change to register allocation and the bot report supports the match.

rejection_notes: Do not generalize PAD_STACK(12) beyond mnCount_8025092C; the evidence only supports this exact function and stack pad change.
Do not infer a global rule that direct union pointer casts are always preferred; this PR only shows one matching case for Struct2070 in pl_80037C60.
Do not infer human reviewer preferences; the loaded slice contains no review comments.
Do not promote mpJointListAdd/mpLib_80057424 symbol relationship beyond the PR body's statement that the loop is shared/inlined without additional source evidence.
